layers: 1-scatter.svg — faint debris (Icon Composer: low opacity, maybe blur)
4-sparks.svg — rare bright cells (keep vivid, maybe slight glow)
iconComposerNotes: Background: use Icon Composer fill — gradient or solid dark (#111118)
Import layers 1-4 as separate layers in a group
Or: group scatter+growth in one group, pi+sparks in another
Adjust translucency per group in Icon Composer
The system adds specular highlights automatically
